$comment: C23 arbitrary-magnitude _BitInt wb/uwb LITERALS (D-CSUBSET-BITINT-WIDE-LITERAL, C4b). `633825300114114700748351602688uwb` is 2^99 → unsigned _BitInt(100) (2 limbs) whose HIGH limb carries 2^35; it decodes through a compile-time bignum and fills the multi-limb value. RED-ON-DISABLE: 2^99>>93==64 and 2^99&1023==0 so 64+0-22==42 — a low-limb-only materialization drops the 2^99, giving big==0 → 0>>93==0 → exit != 42. A `volatile` seed keeps `big` runtime-live so the {shippedPipeline:release} arm still exits 42 (the wide value is realized by address; mem2reg/const-fold preserve the limb fill + shift/mask). Also exercises a NARROW uwb literal (1023uwb → unsigned _BitInt(10)) and int<->wide casts.
